title: Aevion Tinker Training Run Configuration
description: Schema for a Tinker Cookbook training run configuration within Aevion's proof-native infrastructure. Extends tinker_cookbook.supervised.train.Config and tinker_cookbook.rl.train.Config with Aevion-specific fields for Human Gate, QKL tracking, and receipt emission.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this training run

log_path.description: Output directory for metrics, checkpoints, and logs

groups_per_batch.description: Number of EnvGroupBuilders per training batch

topk.description: Top-K tokens for distillation (0 = importance sampling fallback). Used in SDFT training.

teacher_sync_every.description: Optional periodic teacher weight sync interval. null = static teacher.

thinking_format.description: Convert data for thinking models (e.g., Qwen3.5)

dry_run.description: If true, all Tinker API calls return mock responses. Default true = safe path.

human_gate_token_hash.description: SHA-256 of the human_gate_token (NEVER store raw token). Required for live training.

emit_receipts.description: If true, emit TinkerTrainingReceipt to ProofDB for each training operation

corpus_path.description: Path to training corpus (JSONL of PRReviewItem objects)

corpus_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the training corpus file for provenance tracking

dataset_builder.description: Fully qualified Python class name for the dataset builder

evaluator_builders.description: Evaluator class names to use during training

trainable_agents.description: Agents to train with gradient updates. DiFCounsel is always excluded (pure function).

qkl_initial_state.description: Initial QKL state for this training run

reward_dimensions.description: Dimensions for reward computation. Mirrors training_trace_manifest.schema.json.
